battleTraits.name: ’Ere We Go!
battleTraits.effect: Your Brutes are not set up during the deployment phase. Instead, from the third battle round onwards, you can use the ’Ere We Go! placement ability.

battleTraits.name: ’Ere We Go! (Placement)
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Mighty Destroyers
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that was not set up this turn to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target can move up to 3". It can move into combat. If it was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.

enhancements.name: Amberbone Whetstone
enhancements.effect: The Rend characteristic of your general's melee weapons is 2.

enhancements.name: Mega Bossy
enhancements.effect: If this unit charged this turn, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

regimentAbilities.name: Natural Disaster
regimentAbilities.effect: If you make an unmodified charge roll of 8+ for a friendly unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

regimentAbilities.name: A Proper Ruckus
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared the ‘Mighty Destroyers’ ability
regimentAbilities.effect: All friendly units on the battlefield that were not set up this turn are the targets of that ability instead of one.

abilities.name: Get Stuck In, Ladz!
abilities.declare: Pick this unit or a friendly Brute unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 1" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Make a shield bash roll of D6 for each model in this unit that is within 3" of the target. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Unleashed Rage
abilities.effect: This unit has STRIKE-FIRST if it charged in the same turn.

abilities.name: You Messin’?
abilities.effect: Enemy units with a Health characteristic of 1 or 2 cannot contest objectives while they are in combat with this unit.
